name: Lab 18 Golf
about: Lab 18 is a golf performance facility in Roslyn, NY, offering year-round training using advanced technology and PGA-supervised coaching. The venue provides a professional environment for golfers to practice with data-backed feedback and predictive analytics. It features high-end simulators, putting greens, and a lounge area for post-training analysis. The facility caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners looking to master fundamentals to seasoned players seeking refinement.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level technology with TrackMan certification for precise data tracking
PGA Pro supervised practice with real-time, data-backed feedback
Year-round access with a community-driven environment for elite training

simulator_hardware.notes: Certified TrackMan system for ball and club tracking

faq.answer: The facility does not specify whether clubs are provided or required.

faq.answer: No, food service is not mentioned, but a bar is available on-site.

faq.answer: No specific time estimate is provided for 18-hole sessions.
